But I also learned about value. Real

How might your life be better with less?

Well, I unloaded way more than 30 items

Ultimately though, the purpose of

That's because consumption is not the

Compulsory consumption is the problem.
And we can change that by being more

months, I deliberately jettisoned more

Although, if you visited my home today,
you probably wouldn't walk in and yell,

No, you probably just say, "Wow, he's

everything I do own adds real value to

Who's the person I want to become? And
how am I going to define my own success?
And these are tough questions with
